title: SolarEdge Technologies Q1 EPS miss drags shares, bulls eye Q2 margin guidance
text: SolarEdge Q1 2024 Earnings Impact. EPS Miss: SolarEdge's earnings per share miss in Q1 2024 created negative pressure on the stock price immediately following the earnings announcement. Revenue Beat: Despite the EPS miss, the company beat on revenue guidance, demonstrating continued demand in key markets. Q2 Guidance: Management provided positive commentary on Q2 margin guidance, suggesting potential for improvement in profitability metrics in the following quarter. Market Reaction: The mixed results of beating revenue but missing EPS created uncertainty among investors about the company's trajectory. Stock Impact: The EPS miss dragged shares down initially, but management's margin guidance commentary provided some hope for a turnaround.
